backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines an Inquiry type and exposes a `submitInquiry` function which validates all fields and appends the inquiry to an in-memory list.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Gmail address and phone number were added as clickable mailto:/tel: links in both the Contact and Footer components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and hook structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Kare Detailing Garage app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering Navbar, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer inside a dark-themed wrapper.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section displaying brand story text with a red-bordered blockquote and a 2×2 grid of company values with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Booking section with clickable phone and email contact info, working hours, a service selector with INR pricing, and a validated form that submits via the `useSubmitInquiry` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column dark footer containing brand info with social icons, quick nav links, services list, and a dedicated Contact Us column with clickable phone and email links.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background image, gradient overlays, large display heading, dual CTA buttons that scroll to sections, and an animated stats row.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navbar with smooth-scroll navigation links, a 'Book Now' CTA button, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu that changes appearance on scroll.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays three car/bike detailing service packages (Basic Exterior, Interior+Exterior, Bike Wash) as styled cards with pricing, features, and a scroll-to-contact CTA.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitInquiry mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitInquiry method with booking form data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines a dark-first OKLCH color theme (black and red palette) for the garage brand.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with garage brand colors (dark blacks and red/gold), custom fonts (Barlow Condensed, Inter), box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 9) for the Kare Detailing Garage website, including feature list, business details (pricing in INR, contact info, hours), architectural notes, and known issues.
